---
title: "fara"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
#load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(leaflet)
```

```{r}
#load data sets
fara <- read.csv("data/fara_docs.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
#I am now going to make this data set only last from 2012-2024
fara_years <- fara %>% 
  filter()
```
